THOUGHT: The miscompilation arises because the SLP vectorizer combines lanes with different cast kinds (sext and zext) into a single vectorized cast, which can turn a nuw/zext path into a sext for some lanes, producing poison and breaking semantics. The safest fix is to prevent vectorization of cast groups when their opcodes are not uniform. I added a guard in the cast-handling case to detect mixed cast opcodes and bail out, keeping them scalar. Now I will submit the patch to ensure it’s recorded.

```bash
submit-patch
```
